user.description: If you need help with the configuration have a look here: https://github.com/svrooij/home-assistant-components This integration does not accept passwords, you'll need to create a token!

node.description: Configure the Proxmox node and which VMs/containers to monitor.

reconfigure.description: Update the connection details for this Proxmox VE instance.

error.no_vms_or_containers: At least one VM or container ID is required.
error.invalid_id_format: IDs must be numbers separated by commas (e.g. 100,101).

init.description: Select a node to edit, or add a new node.

node.description: Edit the node name and the VM/container IDs to monitor.

error.no_vms_or_containers: At least one VM or container ID is required.
error.invalid_id_format: IDs must be numbers separated by commas (e.g. 100,101).
